title: Structured Discovery Engine Output Schema
description: Output contract for Structured Discovery Engine (SDE) v0.1. Defines the structured discovery question set emitted from a validated SDE input.

sde_version.description: Schema version for the Structured Discovery Engine output contract.

output_id.description: Unique identifier for the SDE output artifact.

source_input_id.description: Identifier of the input object from which this discovery artifact was generated.

question_groups.description: Structured discovery groups containing context-aware questions.

group_id.description: Unique identifier for the question group.

group_name.description: Normalized category name for the discovery group.

group_purpose.description: Human-readable explanation of why this question group exists.

questions.description: Questions belonging to this discovery group.

question_id.description: Unique identifier for the question within the output artifact.

question_text.description: The actual discovery question to ask.

question_intent.description: Why the question is being asked and what ambiguity it is intended to reduce.

priority.description: Relative priority of the question for ambiguity reduction.

ambiguity_flags.description: Optional list of major ambiguity areas identified during discovery generation.

completeness_notes.description: Optional notes about obvious missing context, weak areas, or likely follow-up needs.
